scripts.watchman:reset: watchman shutdown-server 2>/dev/null || true; watchman watch-del-all 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.reset: yarn node:clean && yarn android:clean && yarn start -- --reset-cache
scripts.android:clean: rm -rf android/app/.cxx android/app/build android/build android/.gradle && cd android && ./gradlew clean || true
scripts.ios:clean: cd ios && xcodebuild clean -workspace ReactNativeIgniteKit.xcworkspace -scheme ReactNativeIgniteKit
scripts.ios:bundle:assets: react-native bundle --entry-file index.js --platform ios --dev false --bundle-output ios/main.jsbundle --assets-dest ios
scripts.ios:dev-release: yarn ios:clean && ENVFILE=.env.development react-native run-ios --scheme "ReactNativeCICD development" --configuration Release
scripts.ios:staging-release: yarn ios:clean && ENVFILE=.env.staging react-native run-ios --scheme "ReactNativeCICD staging" --configuration Release
scripts.ios:prod-release: yarn ios:clean && yarn ios:bundle:assets && ENVFILE=.env.production react-native run-ios --scheme "ReactNativeCICD production" --configuration Release
scripts.eas:build: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform all --profile production
scripts.eas:build:development: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform all --profile development
scripts.eas:build:staging: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform all --profile staging
scripts.eas:build:production: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform all --profile production
scripts.eas:build:android: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:android:development: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.eas:build:android:staging: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform android --profile staging
scripts.eas:build:android:production: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios:development: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.eas:build:ios:staging: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform ios --profile staging
scripts.eas:build:ios:production: yarn eas:version:check && eas build --platform ios --profile production
